title: SiTime Q3 2022 Earnings - Eighth Consecutive ASP Increase
text: SiTime came out with quarterly earnings of $0.97 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.85 per share. This compares to earnings of $1.03 per share a year ago. In Q3 2022, SiTime doubled the number of design wins over the same period last year. The company's focus segments, automotive, comms, aerospace, defense, constitute the large majority of these design wins, and they expect that these design wins will start generating revenue in 2023 and beyond. Q3 2022 was SiTime's eighth consecutive quarter of ASP (average selling price) increase. Non-GAAP operating margins were 26.8%. Non-GAAP net income was $21.9 million or $0.97 per share. The company consciously increased inventory this quarter by buying additional wafer safety stock to provide a cushion.
